channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumping yard detected, 11th June
item.description:
Please do something about this dumping yard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maple Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The overgrown trees are obstructing the pavement, next to 73 Bow Lane, 11th June
item.description:
The overgrown trees are obstructing the pavement, making it impassable in places. As a result, pedestrians, including parents with buggies, elderly people, wheelchair users, and others with mobility difficulties, are forced to step into the road in order to pass safely.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Granville Road, Fallow Corner, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampost is bent, 11th June
item.description:
Lampost was hit and now stands at at angle, has been like it for a month or so

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Havelock Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loading sign at angle, 11th June
item.description:
The loading sign outside cavendish apartments 16A wyndham road apreents 2-42 is at an angle. Perhaps a lorry hit it and knocked it, please send someone to fix it? thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wyndham Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken slide, 11th June
item.description:
This broken slide has been reported in April when is it going to be repaired? The local children have very little to play with in this park and have now waited many weeks for this repair. On behalf of the children Can we get it fixed soon please 🙏

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Timothy's Mews, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Incorrect flow of traffic entering the roundabout from and to the bus station, 11th June
item.description:
I use London transport buses to and from Waltham Cross bus station to Enfield and Edmonton. The way the traffic lights are set up creates a problem for buses and other vehicles getting into and out of the centre of Waltham Cross. There is no preference for vehicles trying to get onto the roundabout from the bus station. Often there is a long wait to access the roundabout. This results in gridlocked roads to all destinations. The buses have to push onto the roundabout as there is no break in the flow of traffic from Waltham Abbey, Enfield and Cheshunt. Surely a better way to correct the flow of traffic can be found. This has been the situation for years.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waltham Cross, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible faulty sensor in lamppost 109S12, 11th June
item.description:
The two entrance lamp lights are not working they are operated by a sensor in lamp post 109S12 you replaced this sensor in 2022 as previous fix my street records will show, this is the possible cause for the lights not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking fire access and driveway, 11th June
item.description:
Many cars blocking fire access and emergency access and driveway to 4 garages

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping front of property, 11th June
item.description:
Image self explanatory - collection day for green bags was Tuesday and wooden offcuts being stored front of property, encourages more fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th June
item.description:
Two storage boxes dumped on the green.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elmbrook Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 11th June
item.description:
Pot hole near bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Romney Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Load of barriers and signs left behind, 11th June
item.description:
A load of barriers and signs have been left behind after the redevelopment of the vicarage. They have been there many months. Please remove them, they're an eyesore and obstructing the pavement. Thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thornhill Avenue, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden boards fly tipped, 11th June
item.description:
This was left behind after a bed base was removed from the same spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New private bins now live on the street permanently, 11th June
item.description:
New commercial waste bins that live permanently on the street now on the corner of Peckham rye and Nigel Road (not sure why they are allowed to live on the street) have gathered lots of waste over the past few days. This is a repeat problem that happens regularly now. These bins have drastically reduced the environmental quality of the local area. The attached photos are the view from my window. The smell in the sun is awful and foxes and rats at night gather around it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Rye, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van Dumbreck Rd, 11th June
item.description:
A van has been parked here for about 1 month. This has had bailiff information on it and wheel lock during this time which has since been removed. I suspect it has been abandoned by its owner. It can be found opposite 8 Dumbreck Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dumbreck Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car, 11th June
item.description:
The car looks as though it has been abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Marlings Park Avenue, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the verge, 11th June
item.description:
Reporting it again and again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden, 11th June
item.description:
One of 2 sycamore trees has dead branches overhanging nearby dwellings and is a hazard. See photos.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marquis Road, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess, 11th June
item.description:
Dog fouling every other day outside my house. Needs signs put up, with threats of fines issued.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car for sale on highway, 11th June
item.description:
This car has been left for sale outside my house. It has been there for at least 2 weeks already.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Elmers End Road, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
